title: fix: readapt pricing from provider updates
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
Price changes:
- `nanobanana`: adds Gemini image text output billing at `$2.50/M` tokens.
- `nanobanana-pro`: updates Gemini 3 Pro Image input text/image from `$1.25/M` to `$2.00/M` tokens.
- `grok-imagine`: adds xAI edit input-image cost at `$0.002/image`.
- `grok-imagine-pro`: adds xAI edit input-image cost at `$0.01/image` and corrects output from `$0.07` to `$0.05/image` for the default 1K output.
- `grok-video-pro`: adds xAI start-frame input-image cost at `$0.002/image` and updates video output from `$0.05/sec` to `$0.07/sec`.
- `llama-scout`: updates OpenRouter input from `$0.08/M` to `$0.10/M` tokens.
- `step-3.5-flash`: updates OpenRouter input from `$0.09/M` to `$0.10/M` tokens and removes stale cached-input pricing.
- `mistral`: updates OpenRouter cached input from `$0.15/M` to `$0.015/M` tokens.
- `qwen-coder-large`: adds OpenRouter cached input at `$0.07/M` tokens.
- `mistral-small-3.2`: removes stale cached-input pricing.
- `qwen-tts`: updates Alibaba TTS from `$0.013/1K` to `$0.010/1K` characters.
- `qwen-tts-instruct`: updates Alibaba TTS from `$0.013/1K` to `$0.0115/1K` characters.
- `hyper3d-rodin`: updates Fal Rodin from `$0.40` to `$0.10/gen`.
- `eleven-sfx`: updates ElevenLabs Sound Effects from `$0.004/sec` to `$0.002/sec`.
- `deepseek`: updates Fireworks cached input from `$0.014/M` to `$0.03/M` tokens.
- `glm`: updates Fireworks cached input from `$0.26/M` to `$0.14/M` tokens.
- `claude-sonnet-5`: applies Bedrock promo pricing through `2026-08-31` (`$2/M` input, `$0.20/M` cache read, `$2.50/M` cache write, `$10/M` output).

Other changes:
- Maps Vertex Gemini image prompt usage so Nano Banana text/image inputs are billed.
- Marks `flux` registry provider as VAST; Fireworks remains fallback only.
- Updates `grok-imagine-pro` to call xAI `grok-imagine-image-quality`.
- Refreshes effective-price snapshots and focused pricing coverage.

Validation:
- Local `gen` E2E: `/image/models`, `/text/models`, `/models`, `/v1/models`.
- Live OpenRouter pric

gist.headline: Balancing the pollen books
gist.blurb: We've synced our registries with the latest upstream provider pricing. Enjoy cheaper 3D generations, discounted sound effects, and a quality bump for Grok images!
gist.summary: Synced internal pricing registries across 17 models to match upstream provider changes, and updated grok-imagine-pro to use the higher-fidelity grok-imagine-image-quality endpoint.
gist.impact: Pollen credit burn rates now reflect the latest upstream costsâ€”including significant drops for hyper3d-rodin ($0.40 to $0.10/gen) and eleven-sfxâ€”while grok-imagine-pro users will notice improved image outputs.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot acting as an accountant, reviewing a long receipt or ledger, while the Nomnom creature happily eats the old pricing documents. Represents updating the books and consuming old data.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, reviewing a long glowing digital receipt while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats a stack of old paper ledgers. Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

Speech bubble: 'NOMNOM'. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
